description: While ETH is used as the native gas fee token, Arbitrum (ARB) is the governance token of Arbitrum One empowering protocol governance, ecosystem incentives, and network participation. Today, as an extended utility on AtlantisChain –  the world’s ONLY ultra-super-fast Layer-0 blockchain with 3,600,000 TPS and 0.031-second block time – ATC-20 ARB gives original ERC-20 ARB holders and traders instant finality, ultra-low fees, AI contract capability, and commercialized performance worldwide.
name: Arbitrum
